evidence: Person missing recommended: jobTitle, sameAs, hasCredential
Entity of type FAQPage has no @id — cross-page interconnection blocked
FAQPage schema has 7 Questions but page shows ~14 FAQ pairs
Author has no sameAs URLs (should link LinkedIn + at least one other profile)
Author has no jobTitle or description — credentials not stated
No first-party data signals ("we tested", "our data shows", "we analyzed"). Add at least one concrete observation
Only 3/4 human signals present (author+LinkedIn=false, first-party data=false, original visual=true, 3+ citations=true). High AI-content-flag risk
Specific human voice 4/10 — Mostly committee-sounding boilerplate with occasional flashes of voice (vending machine line, 'number worth stealing').
Genuine opinions 6/10 — A few real opinions appear (schema is overhyped, most AEO advice is repackaged SEO) but they're buried between safe generic claims.
Unexpected phrasings 6/10 — The vending machine and publicist metaphors are fresh; most other phrasing is predictable LLM output.
Point of view 5/10 — Largely surveys both sides; only the conclusion and a couple of asides commit to a stance.
Quotable sentence 6/10 — 'Pages built like vending machines: a model walks up, grabs a stat, walks off' is quotable; little else is.
Intro earns attention 3/10 — Opens with navigation crumbs, TL;DR boilerplate, and a generic definition before anything interesting happens.
